manifest.name: Smart Paste

name: Smart Paste

releases.author: konstantinosGkilas
releases.description:
## Smart Paste v0.1.0

Initial release.

### Features
- **HTML to Markdown** -- Paste from any web page and get clean Markdown
- **Link title fetching** -- Paste a bare URL to get a titled Markdown link
- **Tracker stripping** -- Removes utm_*, fbclid, gclid, and other tracking parameters
- **Amazon URL cleaning** -- Strips /ref= paths from product links
- **Whitespace normalization** -- Collapses excessive blank lines, trims trailing spaces
- **Code block and frontmatter awareness** -- No transformation when pasting inside code fences or YAML frontmatter
- **Image pass-through** -- Image pastes handled normally
- **Google Docs / Word support** -- Detects style-based bold, italic, and strikethrough

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/smart-paste/` directory.
